final_prompt.prompt:
Create a UI design system mockup in a classic minimal tech aesthetic, showcasing web dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls with strong visual hierarchy and a sharp technological edge.

Style/medium: clean minimal tech UI design system, flat vector with precise geometry, dark-mode-first with crisp component boundaries
Composition: multi-panel layout — top row: web dashboard spanning full width; middle row: mobile interface frame flanked by card components; bottom row: button states, toggle controls, input fields, and icon set arranged in a component grid
Subject: web dashboard panel with KPI metric cards, a line/area chart, a data table, and a sidebar navigation; mobile interface screen with bottom tab bar and a list feed; card components in default / hover / active states; button variants (primary, secondary, ghost, destructive); form controls (toggle, slider, checkbox, radio, dropdown)
Scene/backdrop: deep near-black background (#0D0F14 range) with subtle grid or dot-matrix texture suggesting infinite digital space
Lighting/mood: cool blue-white accent glow emanating from active elements, thin neon-edge highlights on interactive components, the quiet hum of a system always on
Color palette: deep space black as the base, electric blue and cyan as primary accent, violet as secondary accent, neutral slate for inactive states, white for primary text — a controlled tension between darkness and luminous precision
Materials/textures: matte dark surface with razor-thin 1px border lines, frosted glass panels on overlay cards, subtle inner shadow on pressed states
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: all components clearly legible at standard viewing distance, consistent 8pt spacing grid, visual hierarchy readable across all three tiers (dashboard / mobile / component), no decorative illustration unrelated to UI
Avoid: warm color palettes, skeuomorphic shadows, stock-photo backgrounds, decorative gradients unrelated to component states, illegible small labels
